title: ClearLag++
description: 🎆Trusted on 2300+ Servers🎆⭐Controlls Mob Spawning ⭐Limits Armor Stand⭐Item Frames⭐Laggy Chunkfinder and Unloader⭐And many more features⭐Check it out Yourself⭐1.18-26.1.2⭐Bukkit/Spigot/Paper/PurPur⭐

<details>
<summary>Placeholder</summary>

| Placeholder             | Function              | Explanation              |
|---------------------|:---------------------:|---------------------:|
| %clearlag_nextclear%            | Next Clear Time              | Displays the time remaining until the next scheduled automatic entity clear. The output is formatted in a readable format, such as 5m 30s (5 minutes and 30 seconds)             |
| %clearlag_nextclear_seconds% | Extension for nextclear | Displays the time remaining until the next scheduled automatic entity clear. Only in Seconds will be Displayed
| %clearlag_autoclear_enabled%            | Show If AutoClear Is On/Off              | Show If AutoClear Is On/Off             |
| %clearlag_autoclear_interval%            | Shows the Time of Auto Clear             | Displays the time set for auto clear             |
| %clearlag_lastclear_items%            | Shows Stats for last Auto Clear              | Shows how many items were removed during auto clear.             |
| %clearlag_lastclear_entities%            | Shows only entitys for last Auto Clear              | The exact number of entities removed during the last auto-clear (excluding items)           |
| %clearlag_lastclear_total%            | Shows what was deleted in the last clear              | The total number of all removed entities (items + other) during the last clear             |
| %clearlag_stats%            | Last Clear Statistics              | Shows the number of entities that were removed during the most recent automated or manual clear action. Example output: 150 entities have been removed             |
| %clearlag_entity_total%            | Total Entity Count (Server)              | Provides the absolute count of all entities currently loaded across all worlds on the server.             |
| %clearlag_entity_world_<worldname>% | Entity Count (Per World) | Displays the number of entities in a specific world defined by replacing <worldname> You can also use the placeholder %clearlag_entities_in_world_<worldname>%, it does the same thing For example, %clearlag_entity_world_world_nether% would show the entity count only in the Nether |
| %clearlag_ram% | RAM Usage | Reports the server's current Java Virtual Machine (JVM) memory usage. It typically shows the used memory versus the total allocated memory in megabytes (MB). Example output: 1024.55 MB / 2048 MB |
| %clearlag_mobs_total%            | Total Entity Count (Mobs)              | The total number of all living mobs (animals and monsters, excluding players, items, etc.)             |
| %clearlag_loaded_chunks%            | Total Chunks Loaded Chunks             | The total number of all loaded chunks on the server             |
| %clearlag_chunkunload_threshold%            | Shows how many mobs have been set until the chunk is unloaded             | Displays the set entity threshold for automatic chunk unloading.             |
| %clearlag_lastunload_chunks%            | Displays the total number of Chunks discharged during the automatic discharge scan             | The total number of all Chunks That got unloaded while the auto unload scan             |

</details>


<details>
<summary>English</summary>

# **ClearLag++**:

---
The ClearLag++ plugin for Minecraft servers is a **powerful tool** for increasing server performance and **comprehensively combating lag**. It offers a variety of intelligent features to ensure smooth and stable operation.

### **Intelligent Entity Management**

**Automatic Cleanup:**

Automatically removes dropped items and entities after a configurable time, with a visible countdown.

* **Comprehensive Protection:** Excludes **named mobs**, **farmed mobs**, and mobs with a **scoreboard tag** from being cleaned up.
* **After-Death & Recent-Activity Protection:** Protects death drops and items dropped near players for a configurable duration.
* **Smart Stacking:** Merges items beyond the normal 64 limit and groups non-stackable items (like potions) to keep entity counts low.
* **Clean-up Effects:** Adds configurable particles and sounds when entities are cleared to make the process feel seamless.

**Targeted Removal:**

Administrators can selectively remove hostile, passive, or all mobs using `/clearlag killmobs` or `/clearlag nuke`.

### **Advanced Performance Optimizations**

**Redstone & Physics Optimization:**

Limits the update rate of redstone components and prevents lag from mass falling-block events (sand/gravel) or piston-heavy contraptions.

**Entity & Tile Entity Limiter:**

Sets strict limits for **Item Frames, Armor Stands, Vehicles, Projectiles, and Tile Entities** (Hoppers, Chests, Spawners) per chunk and globally.

**Mob Spawn & Breeding Limiter:**

Controls the natural spawn rate and prevents breeding lag by limiting the number of animals per chunk.

**AI Optimization for Mobs:**

Reduces processor load by **throttling or removing** the AI of mobs that are far from players.

**Environmental & Connection Control:**

Throttles fire spread, liquid flow, and portal usage. Includes a **Packet Rate Limiter** (ProtocolLib) to stop network-based lag.

### **Monitoring, Diagnostics, and Dynamic Control**

**Performance Metrics & Monitoring:**

Provides real-time statistics on **TPS**, **MSPT**, **CPU utilization**, and **RAM usage**. Includes a **BossBar Performance Meter** for live monitoring.

**Dynamic View Distance:**

Automatically scales server-wide view distance and simulation distance based on real-time TPS and player activity.

**Performance Alerts & Snapshots:**

Notifies administrators and automatically saves **Lag Snapshots** (detailed reports) when performance spikes or falls below thresholds.

**Diagnostic Tools:**

The **Chunk Scanner** identifies chunks with high entity counts, while the **Lag Profiler** highlights performance bottlenecks.

**Multi-World & Time Support:**

Features **Per-World Profiles** and **Time-Based Rules** allowing for unique settings during day, night, or event modes.

**Comprehensive Integration:**

Full native support for **LuckPerms**, **Discord webhooks**, **PlaceholderAPI**, and third-party plugins like **MythicMobs**, **EliteMobs**, **Nexo**, **Oraxen**, **Citizens**, and more.

---
**LuckPerms**

All permissions/commands can be managed via LuckPerms

--------------------------------------------------------------------

</details>
